solve(Prices, Strategy, K) ->
    Original = original_profit(Prices, Strategy),
    A = create_A(Prices, Strategy),
    B = create_B(Prices, Strategy),
    PrefixA = compute_prefix(A),
    PrefixB = compute_prefix(B),
    N = length(Prices),
    M = K div 2,
    MaxChange = compute_max_change(N, K, M, PrefixA, PrefixB),
    Original + max(0, MaxChange).

original_profit(Prices, Strategy) ->
    lists:foldl(fun ({S, P}, Acc) -> Acc + S * P end, 0, lists:zip(Strategy, Prices)).

create_A(Prices, Strategy) ->
    [ -S * P || {S, P} <- lists:zip(Strategy, Prices) ].

create_B(Prices, Strategy) ->
    [ (1 - S) * P || {S, P} <- lists:zip(Strategy, Prices) ].

compute_prefix(List) ->
    lists:reverse( lists:foldl( fun (X, Acc) -> [Acc + X | Acc] end, 0, List) ).

compute_max_change(N, K, M, PrefixA, PrefixB) ->
    End = N - K,
    lists:foldl( fun (S, Acc) ->
        SumA = PrefixA[S + M] - PrefixA[S],
        SumB = PrefixB[S + K] - PrefixB[S + M],
        Current = SumA + SumB,
        max(Acc, Current)
    end, 0, lists:seq(0, End)).
```

-module(solution).
-export([solve/3]).

solve(prices, strategy, K) ->
    Original = original_profit(prices, strategy),
    A = compute_A(prices, strategy),
    B = compute_B(prices, strategy),
    PrefixA = prefix_sums(A),
    PrefixB = prefix_sums(B),
    M = K div 2,
    N = length(prices),
    MaxChange = find_max_change(PrefixA, PrefixB, M, K, N),
    Original + max(0, MaxChange).

original_profit(prices, strategy) ->
    lists:sum([S * P || {S, P} <- lists:zip(strategy, prices)]).

compute_A(prices, strategy) ->
    [ -S * P || {S, P} <- lists:zip(strategy, prices) ].

compute_B(prices, strategy) ->
    [ (1 - S) * P || {S, P} <- lists:zip(strategy, prices) ].

prefix_sums(List) ->
    Reverse = lists:foldl(
        fun(X, Acc) -> [Acc + X | Acc] end,
        [0],
        List
    ),
    lists:reverse(Reverse).

find_max_change(PrefixA, PrefixB, M, K, N) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun(S, Acc) ->
            Start = S,
            EndA = Start + M,
            EndB = Start + K,
            SumA = lists:nth(EndA, PrefixA) - lists:nth(Start, PrefixA),
            SumB = lists:nth(EndB, PrefixB) - lists:nth(EndA, PrefixB),
            Current = SumA + SumB,
            if
                Current > Acc -> Current;
                true -> Acc
            end
        end,
        0,
        lists:seq(0, N - K)

-module(solution).
-export([solve/3]).

solve(Prices, Strategy, K) ->
    N = length(Prices),
    Original = original_profit(Prices, Strategy),
    A = create_A(Prices, Strategy),
    B = create_B(Prices, Strategy),
    PrefixA = prefix_sums(A),
    PrefixB = prefix_sums(B),
    M = K div 2,
    MaxChange = find_max_change(PrefixA, PrefixB, N, K, M),
    Original + max(0, MaxChange).

original_profit(Prices, Strategy) ->
    lists:sum([Strategy(I) * Prices(I) || I <- lists:seq(0, length(Prices) - 1)]).

create_A(Prices, Strategy) ->
    [ -Strategy(I) * Prices(I) || I <- lists:seq(0, length(Prices) - 1) ].

create_B(Prices, Strategy) ->
    [ (1 - Strategy(I)) * Prices(I) || I <- lists:seq(0, length(Prices) - 1) ].

prefix_sums(List) ->
    Reverse = lists:reverse(lists:foldl(fun(X, Acc) -> [Acc + X | Acc] end, [], List)),
    [0 | Reverse].

function solve(prices: number[], strategy: number[], k: number): number {

    // compute original profit

    let original = 0;

    for (let i=0; i < prices.length; i++) {

        original += strategy[i] * prices[i];

    }

    // compute A and B arrays

    const n = prices.length;

    const A = new Array(n).fill(0);

    const B = new Array(n).fill(0);

    for (let i=0; i < n; i++) {

        A[i] = -strategy[i] * prices[i];

        B[i] = (1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i];

    }

    // compute prefix sums for A and B

    const prefixA = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    const prefixB = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i=0; i < n; i++) {

        prefixA[i+1] = prefixA[i] + A[i];

        prefixB[i+1] = prefixB[i] + B[i];

    }

    // now, find the maximum change

    let maxChange = 0;

    const m = k / 2;

    for (let s = 0; s <= n - k; s++) {

        const end = s + k;

        const firstHalfEnd = s + m;

        const sumA = prefixA[firstHalfEnd] - prefixA[s];

        const sumB = prefixB[end] - prefixB[firstHalfEnd];

        const current = sumA + sumB;

        if (current > maxChange) {

            maxChange = current;

        }

    }

    return original + Math.max(0, maxChange);

}
